title: Added a bud demo and tidied up

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 0157499 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 0157499a7afb3ee4ba02aa4c4eaa36788f0dc4a0 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.

Sorry, i'm 26 minutes late to the party.

In `buildah-bud-demo.sh`, `pkgmgr` is declared but never used.
```
pkgmgr=dnf   # switch to yum if using yum
```

Restarting docker daemon may also upset people
https://github.com/ipbabble/buildah/blob/0157499a7afb3ee4ba02aa4c4eaa36788f0dc4a0/demos/buildah-bud-demo.sh#L68
